check.description: Run Nix validation for this repository
check.template: Use Nix-only commands for this repository. Prefer `nix flake check`, then any additional verification available through `nix develop --command ...`, and summarize the results, failures, and next actions.

run.template: Use Nix-only commands for this repository. Verify or exercise the runnable app entrypoint with `nix run .` when appropriate, then summarize what launches and any blockers.

develop.template: Use Nix-only commands for this repository. Inspect or exercise the development environment with `nix develop` or `nix develop --command ...`, then summarize the available tooling, checks, and gaps in the shell setup.
